title: デビュー戦の後に・思惑の外

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon comes into the spotlight through
her debut race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rather than bask in the afterglow of her
performance, she makes a graceful exit to go
continue her research.
